title: 增强 Browser Share 插件服务地址配置与 debugger 模式

subagents.prompt: 请为任务“增强 Browser Share 插件服务地址配置与 debugger 模式”做架构设计。背景：用户反馈蛋黄派浏览器插件似乎固定作用于 http://localhost:30141/，希望在插件分享页面允许指定蛋黄派服务地址以兼容局域网/反代/自定义端口；同时希望支持类似 OpenClaw 的 Chrome debugger 模式，以获得更细节的信息。请先阅读当前 ypi web 中 Browser Share 相关文档/代码，以及外部扩展项目（若可访问，历史知识…

`implement.md` 已包含人类可读子任务表和 `json ypi-implementation-plan` 机器可读计划，共 8 个子任务。

## 已阅读依据

- ypi web Browser Share 文档与代码：
  - `docs/architecture/browser-share.md`
  - `docs/modules/{api,frontend,library}.md`
  - `app/api/browser-share/**`
  - `lib/browser-share-*`
  - `components/BrowserShareControl.tsx`
- 外部扩展项目：
  - `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/README.md`
  - `manifest.json`
  - `src/service-worker/service-worker.js`
  - `src/content/snapshot.js`
  - `src/popup/*`

## 核心建议

- 服务地址配置放在 Chrome 扩展 popup，默认仍为 `http://localhost:30141`。
- 自定义地址使用统一 `baseUrl`，active share 固化创建时地址，避免串到另一台 ypi。
- 非默认 origin 推荐 runtime optional host permission，不默认加入 `<all_urls>`。
- debugger/CDP 必须显式 opt-in；推荐标准插件不含 `debugger`，另提供 debugger build/manifest。
- CDP 只在扩展端执行；ypi web 继续通过现有 session-scoped bridge 接收受限、脱敏、可选字段。
- 截图默认不上传；如进入本轮必须单独 opt-in/审批。

## 验证

- 已用 `python3` 解析 `implement.md` 的 implementation plan JSON，确认有效。
- 未运行 `npm run lint` / `tsc` / extension build，因为本轮仅设计、无生产代码改动。

## 主会话需确认

1. debugger 权限：标准插件 + debugger build，还是单一插件加入 `debugger`？
2. 截图能力是否纳入本轮？推荐暂不默认加入。
3. 远程/LAN ypi 安全口径：仅提示可信网络/受保护反代，还是新增 Browser Share 局部 token？
4. 是否允许实现员同步修改外部扩展仓库 `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension`。

## 核心建议

- 服务地址配置放在 Chrome 扩展 popup，默认仍为 `http://localhost:30141`。
- 自定义地址使用统一 `baseUrl`，active share 固化创建时地址，避免串到另一台 ypi。
- 非默认 origin 推荐 runtime optional host permission，不默认加入 `<all_urls>`。
- debugger/CDP 必须显式 opt-in；推荐标准插件不含 `debugger`，另提供 debugger build/manifest。
- CDP 只在扩展端执行；ypi web 继续通过现有 session-scoped bridge 接收受限、脱敏、可选字段。

subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete — `extension-base-url-settings`

#### Files Changed

- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/src/popup/popup.html` — added service address settings UI, connection status, warning, active share base URL display.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/src/popup/popup.css` — styled settings panel, input, buttons, warnings.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/src/popup/popup.js` — added URL normalization, health test, storage for `baseUrl`/`lastHealth`, optional host permission request, reset-to-default.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/manifest.json` — added `optional_host_permissions` for `http://*/*` and `https://*/*`; default hosts remain localhost/127.0.0.1 only.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/scripts/validate.mjs` — added validation against broad default host permissions and required optional permissions.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/README.md` — documented configurable service address and permission/security behavior.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — updated handoff with subtask implementation status.

#### Verification

- `cd ~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension && node --check src/popup/popup.js` — passed.
- `cd ~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension && npm run build` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- Did **not** implement transport unification, CDP/debugger, or screenshot features; those are later subtasks.
- Need real Chrome manual validation for optional host permission behavior with custom ports/LAN/reverse-proxy path.
- No commit/push performed.

transcript.taskId: 20260706-134325-增强-browser-share-插件服务地址配置与-debugger-模式

subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `app/api/browser-share/health/route.ts` — bumped health response to `version: 2` with capabilities for service address config, DOM/debugger capture modes, long-poll, and opt-in screenshot metadata.
- `lib/browser-share-types.ts` — added optional Browser Share metadata types: `captureMode`, `viewport`, debugger summary, bounds, AX fields, selector/frame/debugger refs, source/baseUrl, capabilities, and screenshot summary.
- `lib/browser-share-manager.ts` — added bounded sanitization for new snapshot/share/result metadata and projected sanitized metadata in session state.
- `app/api/browser-share/commands/[commandId]/result/route.ts` — accepts optional capture/debugger/screenshot result metadata.
- `docs/modules/api.md` — documented updated Browser Share route metadata compatibility.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented updated Browser Share types/manager responsibilities.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — blocked: dependencies are incomplete; `eslint-config-next` missing.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — blocked: `node_modules/.bin/tsc` missing.
- `tsc --noEmit --pretty false` — attempted with global `tsc`; blocked by missing project dependencies/types (`react`, `next`, Node types, pi packages, etc.).

#### Notes / Risks

- Did not add `shareId`, `tabId`, or `baseUrl` to agent tool parameters.
- Screenshot support is metadata-only here; no screenshot payload/data storage added.
- Main session should install/restore project dependencies before final lint/type-check.

implementationPlan.summary: 增强 Browser Share：先实现扩展 popup 可配置 ypi web baseUrl 与全链路 transport；再为 ypi web 增加兼容 metadata；最后在明确安全策略下实现 opt-in debugger/CDP 模式与文档验证。完整设计见 implement.md。

groups.title: popup 服务地址设置、URL 规范化、health test、host permission
service worker 全链路使用 baseUrl，active share 固化地址
ypi web health/capabilities 与 snapshot/debugger 可选字段兼容
确认并实现 debugger 权限/build 策略
CDP attach/detach 与受限调试快照采集
ypi web 状态展示、manager sanitize、tool summary
文档、自动验证、手工验收与交接

extension-base-url-settings.summary:
### Implementation Complete — `extension-base-url-settings`

#### Files Changed

- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/src/popup/popup.html` — added service address settings UI, connection status, warning, active share base URL display.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/src/popup/popup.css` — styled settings panel, input, buttons, warnings.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/src/popup/popup.js` — added URL normalization, health test, storage for `baseUrl`/`lastHealth`, optional host permission request, reset-to-default.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/manifest.json` — added `optional_host_permissions` for `http://*/*` and `https://*/*`; default hosts remain localhost/127.0.0.1 only.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/scripts/validate.mjs` — added validation against broad default host permissions and required optional permissions.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/README.md` — documented configurable service address and permission/security behavior.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — updated handoff with subtask implementation status.

#### Verification

- `cd ~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension && node --check src/popup/popup.js` — passed.
- `cd ~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension && npm run build` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- Did **not** implement transport unification, CDP/debugger, or screenshot features; those are later subtasks.
- Need real Chrome manual validation for optional host permission behavior with custom ports/LAN/reverse-proxy path.
- No commit/push performed.

localReview.summary: Implementer completed popup service address settings, URL normalization, health test UI, permissions/manifest basics in extension repository.

extension-base-url-transport.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/src/service-worker/service-worker.js` — added shared `normalizeBaseUrl` / `apiUrl` helpers; routed create share, snapshot upload, command polling, and command result posting through active/share-specific base URL; expanded `YPI_GET_STATE` with settings and active share base URL.
- `~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension/src/popup/popup.js` — consumes new state shape and warns when current settings differ from the active share’s fixed base URL.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260706-134325-增强-browser-share-插件服务地址配置与-debugger-模式/handoff.md` — appended this subtask handoff.

- `cd ~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension && node --check src/popup/popup.js` — passed
- `cd ~/gitProjects/ypi-browser-share-extension && npm run build` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Did not implement CDP/debugger or screenshot behavior per subtask boundary.
- Manual Chrome validation still needed for custom port/LAN/reverse-proxy path and active-share address switching.
- ypi web lint/tsc not run; no ypi web production code changed by this subtask.

localReview.summary: Implemented configured baseUrl transport across extension service worker and activeShare baseUrl pinning.

web-browser-share-compat-fields.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `app/api/browser-share/health/route.ts` — bumped health response to `version: 2` with capabilities for service address config, DOM/debugger capture modes, long-poll, and opt-in screenshot metadata.
- `lib/browser-share-types.ts` — added optional Browser Share metadata types: `captureMode`, `viewport`, debugger summary, bounds, AX fields, selector/frame/debugger refs, source/baseUrl, capabilities, and screenshot summary.
- `lib/browser-share-manager.ts` — added bounded sanitization for new snapshot/share/result metadata and projected sanitized metadata in session state.
- `app/api/browser-share/commands/[commandId]/result/route.ts` — accepts optional capture/debugger/screenshot result metadata.
- `docs/modules/api.md` — documented updated Browser Share route metadata compatibility.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented updated Browser Share types/manager responsibilities.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — blocked: dependencies are incomplete; `eslint-config-next` missing.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — blocked: `node_modules/.bin/tsc` missing.
- `tsc --noEmit --pretty false` — attempted with global `tsc`; blocked by missing project dependencies/types (`react`, `next`, Node types, pi packages, etc.).

#### Notes / Risks

- Did not add `shareId`, `tabId`, or `baseUrl` to agent tool parameters.
- Screenshot support is metadata-only here; no screenshot payload/data storage added.
- Main session should install/restore project dependencies before final lint/type-check.

localReview.summary: Implemented Browser Share health/capabilities and optional debugger/screenshot metadata compatibility with sanitization in ypi web.
